special_mechanics.name: Baseball Fielding
special_mechanics.description: Player controls fielders to catch and throw baseballs during gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Batting
special_mechanics.description: Player controls batter timing and positioning for hitting

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No movement physics data available in source. This is a sports baseball game with baseball-specific mechanics rather than character platforming physics. The Cutting Room Floor article focuses on regional differences and unused graphics, not gameplay physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Little League Baseball: Championship Series
